message:
Command `MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
WRAPPER_V="$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v"

echo "=== How amuxbus ports appear in module header ==="
# Show a few examples from the port list
grep -n "amuxbus\|pad_a_esd_0_h\|pad_a_noesd_h" "$WRAPPER_V" | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== Total lines in wrapper.v ==="
wc -l "$WRAPPER_V"

echo ""
echo "=== How are these signals used inside the module body? ==="
# Count occurrences of amuxbus inside instantiations
grep -c "amuxbus" "$WRAPPER_V"
grep "\.amuxbus_a\|\.amuxbus_b" "$WRAPPER_V" | head -5` executed with exit code 0.

echo "=== How amuxbus ports appear in module header ==="

grep -n "amuxbus\|pad_a_esd_0_h\|pad_a_noesd_h" "$WRAPPER_V" | head -20

echo ""

wc -l "$WRAPPER_V"

echo ""

# Count occurrences of amuxbus inside instantiations
grep -c "amuxbus" "$WRAPPER_V"
grep "\.amuxbus_a\|\.amuxbus_b" "$WRAPPER_V" | head -5", "timeout": 10}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== How amuxbus ports appear in module header ===

31:    inout clk_pad_a_noesd_h,
32:    inout clk_amuxbus_a,
33:    inout clk_amuxbus_b,
45:    inout reset_n_pad_a_esd_0_h,
46:    inout reset_n_pad_a_noesd_h,

48:    inout reset_n_amuxbus_b,
72:    inout pad_gpioa_0_pad_a_esd_0_h,
74:    inout pad_gpioa_0_pad_a_noesd_h,
75:    inout pad_gpioa_0_amuxbus_a,
76:    inout pad_gpioa_0_amuxbus_b,

102:    inout pad_gpioa_1_pad_a_noesd_h,
103:    inout pad_gpioa_1_amuxbus_a,
104:    inout pad_gpioa_1_amuxbus_b,

2396 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v

100

WRAPPER_V="$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v"

echo "=== How amuxbus ports appear in module header ==="
# Show a few examples from the port list
grep -n "amuxbus\|pad_a_esd_0_h\|pad_a_noesd_h" "$WRAPPER_V" | head -20

echo ""
echo "=== Total lines in wrapper.v ==="
wc -l "$WRAPPER_V"

echo ""
